subcodes.first_line: O spiritual friends! In this luminous morn 'Abdu'l-Bahá fell to remembering the divine friends and took up His pen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران روحانی در این صبح نورانی عبدالبهاء بیاد دوستان رحمانی افتاد و بنگارش
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @firmness in the Covenant
